objective: Implement the formal essence of Hegemon in Lean: a small semantic core with LedgerState, Action, Block, ObserverView, and Transition; one proof surface for no counterfeiting, no double spend, no theft, asset isolation, per-asset conservation, bridge safety, and privacy projection; a production path refinement relation for parser -> admitted action -> replay -> storage -> publication with exact raw/stored canonical bytes and fail-closed failure paths; named primitive/proof/DA/storage/local-ZK/timing/topology/miner-ordering/global-privacy assumptions; and canonical term evidence from one source of truth.
measurement_method: The checked generator formal/lean/Hegemon/Essence/GenerateCoreVectors.lean emits the required type set, theorem set, production stage order, named assumption boundary, canonical term source, and progress items. scripts/check_essence_core_vectors.py recomputes the overall percentage from those generated progress items and compares this ledger to the generated source.
external_assumption_boundary: Completion here is not assumption-free cryptography. ML-KEM, ML-DSA, AEAD, hash/transcript security, STARK/PCS soundness, DA retention, storage durability, local zero-knowledge, timing privacy, topology privacy, miner-ordering privacy, and global traffic privacy remain explicit named assumptions unless and until a real proof or external review artifact discharges them.
acceptance_gates: cd formal/lean && lake build Hegemon.Essence.Core Hegemon.Essence.GenerateCoreVectors Hegemon
